project.title: qPCR Module Demo
project.description:
This repository contains an interactive eLearning module designed to train learners on best practices for preventing contamination in qPCR workflows. Built in Articulate Storyline 360, the module emphasizes real-world lab scenarios, decision-making, and applied learning. The module covers key topics including sources of contamination, workflow separation (pre-PCR vs post-PCR), proper pipetting techniques, reagent and sample handling, and cleaning/decontamination protocols. Learners engage with interactive elements such as “Find the Risk” scenarios, drag-and-drop sequencing, and knowledge checks to reinforce critical concepts.
This project was developed as a portfolio demonstration using publicly available guidance from organizations such as the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and the National Institutes of Health. It is intended to showcase instructional design, Storyline development, and SCORM-ready deployment capabilities for training in laboratory, healthcare, and compliance-driven environments.
